# Bookify

> Open-source reference app built on the Payout Partner (POP) API v2.

Bookify demonstrates how to onboard freelancers, create bookings, and process payouts using POP's REST API.

## Links

- Source code: https://github.com/payoutpartner/bookify-app
- Live demo: https://bookify.app
- About page: https://bookify.app/about
- POP API docs: https://sandbox.core.payoutpartner.com/api-docs

## Key concepts

- Booker: a company that hires and pays freelancers
- Freelancer: an individual who gets booked and paid
- Enrollment: the relationship between a booker and a freelancer (maps to POP's enrollment concept)
- Booking: a unit of work with rate and hours
- Payout: a payment processed through POP's API

## Tech stack

Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, Bootstrap 5, Faraday HTTP client, JWT for browser redirects.
